pr.title: feat(inventory): canonical spine + ranked match API
pr.rollback: Revert the PR; if migration already applied, add a follow-up rollback migration to drop new inventory objects.

receipt.goal: Build canonical inventory spine and deterministic ranked matching API for household item logging using real schema truth only.
verification_steps: pnpm -C web build succeeds on latest main baseline
pnpm -C web build succeeds after inventory spine changes
Apply migration and run SQL proof queries for ranking and RLS
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert PR; if SQL already applied, run a rollback migration that drops inventory_match_product_types, normalize_inventory_alias, telemetry/owned-items tables, aliases/types tables, and enum types.
